```{r patient-info-table}
# Extract patient/sample metadata from config and QC results
patient_data <- tibble(
  Field = c(
    "Sample ID",
    "Tumor Type",
    "Institution",
    "Laboratory Director",
    "Report Date",
    "Panel",
    "Specimen Type"
  ),
  Value = c(
    sample_id,
    config$sample$tumor_type %||% "Not specified",
    config$sample$institution %||% "Not specified",
    config$sample$lab_director %||% "Not specified",
    format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y"),
    config$panel$name %||% "TSO500",
    config$sample$specimen_type %||% "FFPE"
  )
)

patient_data |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Patient & Specimen Details**")
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    Field = "Parameter",
    Value = "Details"
  ) |>
  cols_width(
    Field ~ pct(35),
    Value ~ pct(65)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "#37474f"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = Field)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#f5f5f5"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(patient_data), by = 2))
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(70),
    table.font.size = px(13),
    heading.align = "left",
    table.border.top.color = "#1565c0",
    table.border.top.width = px(3)
  )
```
